name: Mrs Fields Chocolate Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a double boiler over hot (but not boiling) water, melt half a cup of butter and the baking chocolate. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, soda, and salt.
4. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, blend the sugars at medium speed until fluffy.
5. Add the remaining half cup of melted butter and mix to form a grainy paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
6. Add eggs and vanilla, and beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
7. Add the melted chocolate and blend until thoroughly combined.
8. Add the flour mixture, raisins, and chocolate chips. Blend just until combined.
9. Drop rounded tablespoons onto ungreased baking sheets 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until set. Transfer to a cool, flat surface immediately with a spatula.
